description: Marks temporal relationships where the object of the preposition occurs earlier than the reference point. As the prepositional twin of the conjunction, 'pheo' allows temporal sequence to modify nouns, acknowledging how moments arise from what preceded them, carrying forward the echo of their origins.
sound_symbolism: The word begins with 'phe', where the soft fricative 'ɸ' breathes time forward, while the focused 'e' marks a specific moment of departure. This precision then opens into 'o', the round vowel of expanded consequence, suggesting how events flower from their temporal seeds. The vowel journey from focused past to open future mirrors how 'after' works—specific moments yielding to the spaciousness of what follows. Speaking 'pheo' requires the mouth to enact temporal flow, making sequence tangible.
grammatical_notes: Functions as a temporal preposition taking noun phrase objects, maintaining perfect structural parallel with 'phoe' but inverse temporal orientation. Precedes the noun it modifies: 'pheo [ceremony]' (after ceremony = after the ceremony), 'pheo [summer]' (after summer = after summer), 'pheo [realization]' (after realization = after realization). The minimal pair with 'phoe' (distinguished only by vowel order) represents one of Phi's most elegant temporal symmetries. Does not imply causation—sequence does not equal consequence.

pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: The word embodies karma in its temporal sense—what comes after carries the imprint of what came before, yet each moment also offers fresh possibility. The opening into 'o' reminds us that 'after' is spacious, not determined.
pillars.solarpunk-values: Designing regenerative futures requires understanding what comes after our actions—the ripple effects, the seventh-generation impacts. 'Pheo' serves this forward-thinking temporality that considers consequences across time.
pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Agricultural wisdom reads the land for what came before—this year's growth reveals last year's care. 'Pheo' honors this understanding that 'after' is where wisdom proves itself, where patience bears fruit.
